beats.narration: Welcome to acoustic emission. Most methods push energy in. This one stays silent and lets stressed, active flaws announce themselves.

payload.title: ACOUSTIC EMISSION
payload.sub: Stress the structure. Let the flaws speak.

beats.narration: Every other method interrogates the part. AE is passive: stress it, and only active sources speak, while fixed sensors watch the whole structure.
A crack jump releases stored energy as a stress wave. The sensor catches microvolts; the preamp boosts it; the system reduces each hit to features.

payload.heading: From crack jump to recorded hit
payload.note: WAVE → SENSOR → PREAMP → AMPLITUDE · COUNTS · ENERGY

beats.narration: Load memory governs the test. Kaiser: a sound structure stays silent until past its previous maximum. Felicity: damaged structures speak early, below it.
Arrival-time differences between sensors locate the source. AE finds the active flaw; other methods size it.

payload.sub: AE finds active flaws — others size them.
